commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=cc1f805c8c75796c92ccca8149ca74d5b96b7a1b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds read-only impact-label routing groups to the issue triage dashboard, including snapshot fields, browser-local filtering, docs, and dashboard tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This is a feature PR for a new dashboard grouping/filtering surface, and the source path is reviewable without a current-main bug reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because contributor-supplied behavior proof and taxonomy/product acceptance cannot be provided by repair automation.

target.title: feat(dashboard): add issue routing groups
target.body:
## Summary

- project existing `impact:*` labels into read-only maintainer routing groups
- add shareable, browser-local impact-group filtering to issue triage
- preserve multi-group membership and an explicit unclassified bucket
- leave PR proof triage, GitHub labels, assignments, comments, repair, and close behavior unchanged

## Decision boundary

This is phase 1 for https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/issues/132. It deliberately uses the impact labels ClawSweeper already populates instead of inventing channel/component labels with near-zero current coverage.

Landing this PR approves the read-only grouping taxonomy:

- Message delivery: `impact:message-loss`
- Auth providers: `impact:auth-provider`
- State and data: `impact:session-state`, `impact:data-loss`
- Reliability: `impact:crash-loop`
- Security: `impact:security`
- Other impact: `impact:other`
- Unclassified: no recognized impact label

It does not approve auto-assignment, Discord routing, new label creation, or mutation of any GitHub item. Those remain separate decisions.

## Safety

- no new GitHub API calls
- no writes or workflow dispatches
- filtering is limited to the already loaded dashboard snapshot
- multi-label groups hide the outbound GitHub query link when GitHub Search cannot represent the local OR filter faithfully

## Verification

- `pnpm run check`
- autoreview clean after fixing the multi-label GitHub query mismatch

Issue: https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/issues/132
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
